div1.entryFree: Paved, laid over and floored as with stones: his p. bed (the grave) Meas. V, 440. if the streets were p. with thine eyes, LLL IV, 3, 278. by p. fountain, Mids. II, 1, 84 (== pebbly). my way shall be p. with English faces, H5 III, 7, 87. when the way was made, and p. with gold, H8 I, 1, 188.
